title: Persistent Developer-Workspace Runtime
claim: OpenHands runs the agent loop inside a long-lived sandboxed workspace (Docker/local/remote) with a stateful bash shell, file tree, test runner, and exposed ports — distinct from a stateless snippet executor.
verification_note: agent-utilities RLM sandbox (rlm/sandboxes/base.py) is snippet-against-namespace (code -> {updated_vars, stdout}); no persistent cwd/env/filetree. docker_backend.py tears down the container per snippet (mkdtemp->run--rm->rmtree). Gap confirmed.
success_metric: DevWorkspace start->act(CmdRun/FileEdit/TestRun)->stop round-trips against docker + local backends; tests/runtime live-path green

title: Action/Observation Event Protocol
claim: Every agent step is a typed Action that yields a typed Observation, streamed over an event bus to the UI and persisted to history.
verification_note: No equivalent typed action/observation protocol in agent-utilities; RLM SandboxResult is stdout+vars only. The docker UDS bridge (docker_backend._start_bridge/_RUNNER_SCRIPT) is a reusable transport but only carries host-helper calls.
success_metric: Frozen Action/Observation discriminated unions round-trip through bridge framing; chunked streaming of >64KB test output; tests/runtime/test_event_protocol green

title: Workspace-Action Provenance Graph
claim: OpenHands keeps a linear event history; agent-utilities can SURPASS by mirroring every action/observation into the KG as provenance nodes grounded to the Code symbols mutated — replayable and learnable.
verification_note: Code ontology is live (pipeline/phases/parse.py emits Code/Test/Feature + calls/covers edges; ontology_software.ttl). agent_runner.py already mints trace:{run_id} + _add_edge HAS_CONTEXT — extendable to action provenance.
success_metric: After a FileEditAction the KG contains (:WorkspaceAction)-[:MUTATED]->(:Code) for touched symbols, queryable via graph_query; tests/runtime/test_provenance_mirror_live_path green

title: Code-Intelligence Tools (symbol-graph queries)
claim: OpenHands grounds the agent via context-stuffing + LLMSummarizingCondenser; agent-utilities SURPASSES by turning find-definition/who-calls/impacted-tests into graph queries over the live code ontology.
verification_note: calls/covers/dependsOn edges already populated by ingestion (engine.py:743 CALLS/PART_OF_FEATURE; ontology_software.ttl :calls/:covers/:dependsOn). KnowledgeGraph.query()/kg.ontology available via facade.
success_metric: who_calls/impacted_tests/call_graph return correct symbol sets on an ingested fixture repo; tests/tools/test_code_intelligence_live_path green

title: KG-Grounded SWE Agent (CodeAct equivalent)
claim: OpenHands' CodeActAgent runs the edit->run->test loop; agent-utilities adds a `swe` orchestration mode driving the same loop over the dev-workspace, grounded in graph queries.
verification_note: No swe/codeact agent or mode exists (grep swebench/codeact empty). create_agent() + AgentOrchestrationEngine.dispatch (modes graph/stream/dynamic/parallel/workflow/sdd/research) is the extension seam.
success_metric: swe mode lands a passing edit on a fixture repo, calling who_calls/impacted_tests before raw reads; tests/orchestration/test_swe_agent_loop green

title: SWE-bench Evaluation Harness
claim: OpenHands is benchmarked on SWE-bench; agent-utilities has no code-task harness (only LongMemEval).
verification_note: grep swe.bench empty. harness/eval_corpus.py (EvalCorpus) + continuous_evaluation_engine.py (BacktestHarness) + server/routers/benchmark.py (LongMemEval) are the reuse patterns.
success_metric: End-to-end run on 1-2 SWE-bench Lite instances yields resolved/unresolved scoring recorded via BacktestHarness; /api/swebench/report returns aggregate

title: SWE-Failure-Driven Remediation (golden-loop self-improvement)
claim: The SURPASS lever: SWE-bench failures become FailureRecords -> file_gap_topic -> golden loop remediation -> regression-gated governed merge. OpenHands has no self-improvement from benchmark failures.
verification_note: adaptation/failure_analyzer.py (FailureRecord/cluster_failures/file_gap_topic/make_regression_check) + research/golden_loop.py (run_one_cycle/unresolved_topics) + AHE-3.14 governed merge are all live (failure_driven_evolution.md).
success_metric: A forced unresolved instance mints a gap-topic Concept and a remediation branch; make_regression_check blocks merge until the exact instance re-resolves

title: Git Issue/PR -> Task Resolver
claim: OpenHands turns issues/PRs into agent tasks across 6 git platforms with webhooks + a suggested-tasks taxonomy (merge-conflicts/failing-checks/unresolved-comments/open-issue/PR).
verification_note: agent-utilities has gitlab/github MCP connectors but no issue->task resolver or webhook taxonomy. Surpass by ingesting issues/PRs as ontology objects so suggested-tasks become graph queries. Enqueue via agent_dispatch.py (ORCH-1.45).
success_metric: A posted test webhook enqueues an swe task with {problem_statement, repo, base_ref}; suggested-tasks query returns expected task kinds

title: Browser-Agent Tier
claim: OpenHands includes a browser action surface (playwright/browsergym) for web interaction within the agent loop.
verification_note: agent-utilities has an agent-browser skill but no in-loop BrowseAction. Keep optional, off the core edit->test critical path.
success_metric: BrowseAction returns a BrowserObservation(dom, screenshot_ref) gated by ActionPolicy on an opt-in workspace

title: Action/Observation Streaming in agent-webui
claim: OpenHands streams the action/observation event stream to a React chat UI in real time.
verification_note: agent-webui exists (separate repo, consumes gateway). Surpass by adding a KG-provenance side panel showing the symbol graph the agent reasoned over. Reuse server/app.py websocket/SSE patterns.
success_metric: agent-webui renders live action/observation cards + KG provenance panel from /api/runtime SSE during an swe run
